spell.asterismarcanum.starfire.guide: Bring forth a minor piece of the heavens themselves, and launch it towards where you are looking.
spell.asterismarcanum.starcutter.guide: Generate a small orb of astral magic before you, and then barrage that area with magical tears.
spell.asterismarcanum.astral_gateway.gui: Harness the power of the Stellar Periapt to transport you and those around you to and from the Astral Sea. (not craftable)
spell.asterismarcanum.moonbeamed.guide: Disappear in a flash of light, and appear at the location in which you are looking.
spell.asterismarcanum.brightburst.guide: Bring forth a warding aura which pushes away nearby enemies.
spell.asterismarcanum.night_vision.guide: Bestow your eyes with the ability to see clearly, even in the darkest of places.
spell.asterismarcanum.star_swarm.guide: Call upon the night sky to manifest as a mass of lights which follow your command to attack your enemies.
spell.asterismarcanum.tidal_lock.guide: Lock yourself into place, allowing you to hover until you are knocked free or leave of your own accord.
spell.asterismarcanum.constellation.guid: Rely on the magic of the patterns in the night sky, summoning stars which after a short moment will burst with explosive light.
spell.asterismarcanum.luminous_beam.guid: Conjure a beam of destructive light, damaging enemies in front of you while continuously consuming mana.
spell.asterismarcanum.summon_lunar_moths: Conjure a flock of moths which will fly towards and debuff your enemies.
spell.asterismarcanum.wishing_star.guide: Dash through the air as though you yourself are a shooting star.
spell.asterismarcanum.piercing_light.gui: Unleash a burst of luminous shards from your position, damaging enemies nearby.
